target.title: Fold Telegram RTT sampling into live QA evidence
target.body:
## Summary

- Fold Telegram package RTT sampling into the normal Telegram live QA lane instead of maintaining a separate `pnpm rtt` command and Telegram-only RTT Docker driver.
- Emit repeated sample timing through `qa-evidence.json` under `result.timing` for `telegram-mentioned-message-reply`, including avg/p50/p95/max/sample/failure counts.
- Delete the standalone Telegram RTT scripts, harness, fixture, and script tests; package Telegram live now accepts `OPENCLAW_NPM_TELEGRAM_WARM_SAMPLES`, `OPENCLAW_NPM_TELEGRAM_SAMPLE_TIMEOUT_MS`, `OPENCLAW_NPM_TELEGRAM_MAX_FAILURES`, and `OPENCLAW_NPM_TELEGRAM_SAMPLE_SCENARIOS`.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.test.ts test/scripts/npm-telegram-live.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.test.ts scripts/e2e/npm-telegram-live-runner.ts test/scripts/npm-telegram-live.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/e2e/npm-telegram-live-runner.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --cached --check`
- `rg -n 'npm-telegram-rtt|scripts/rtt|rtt-harness|telegram-qa-summary-rtt|qa-evidence-summary\.json|QA_EVIDENCE_SUMMARY_FILENAME' package.json scripts test docs .github extensions --glob '!node_modules' || true`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Telegram package RTT sampling now runs through the standard package Telegram live QA lane and writes timing into `qa-evidence.json` instead of a separate RTT command/output shape.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on macOS, using focused unit/schema/script tests and extension typecheck.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the focused evidence, Telegram live runtime, and package Telegram live script tests; ran extension typecheck; ran docs list; checked formatter, script lint, whitespace, and stale RTT script references.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 3 files / 67 tests; `pnpm tsgo:extensions`, focused formatter check, focused script lint, and `git diff --check` passed; stale reference scan returned no deleted RTT command/script references.

Observed result after fix: Telegram sample controls flow through package Telegram live, repeated samples are summarized as evidence timing, and the standalone RTT scripts/tests/package command are removed.

What was not tested: No live Telegram/Convex/Docker lane was executed in this local pass.
target.author: romneyda
